title: ASR Federal 3 in 1 Leather ID Badge Holder Police Gear with Lanyard Neck Chain,
description:
The ASR Federal Leather Double Sided Police ID Badge Holder is compact ID card holder and police badge holder in one. On one side, a compartment with a clear window to house important identification credentials and other cards if needed; flip it over and you’ll find an easy to use pin-back badge mount to keep your badge secure. In addition to holding ID and a police badge, the holder can be worn three ways: carried in pocket or bag for travel, around neck by a (included but detachable) beaded neck chain or lastly, folded over and secured to a belt or holster strap

ASR Federal 3 in 1 Leather ID Badge Holder Police Gear with Lanyard Neck Chain,

The ASR Federal Leather Double Sided Police ID Badge Holder is compact ID card holder and police badge holder in one. On one side, a compartment with a clear window to house important identification credentials and other cards if needed; flip it over and you’ll find an easy to use pin-back badge mount to keep your badge secure.

Key Features

  • POLICE BADGE AND ID CARD HOLDER: Featuring a clear window to protect your ID and cards on one side and secure badge mount on the other, the ID card holder and police badge holder keeps important pieces of identification secure and accessible; detachable beaded lanyard neck chain included
  • TACTICAL BELT CLIP ATTACHMENT: In addition to wearing the ID card holder and police badge holder around your neck or stowed away in a jacket or pocket, the interior of the police badge holder features Velcro strip at the bottom edge to keep the badge holder in place, whether secured to a belt or holster strap
  • 100% GENUINE LEATHER MATERIAL: This badge holder boasts a strong and sturdy construction, made from 100% genuine, heavy gauge leather; the police equipment badge holder with lanyard will relax over time with use as it molds to your carrying habits, but will always maintain its quality construction
  • COMPACT MINIMALIST DESIGN: The police equipment badge holder and ID card holder features a purposeful low profile, minimal and compact design without any unnecessary bulk, making it easy to wear, carry, store and travel with
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 4.5 by 3 inches; Color: Black with clear ID windows; Neck Chain Dimensions: 12 inches in length from neck to chest; Badge Type: Universal; Material: Leather

Product Specifications

  • MPN: BLBNC2
  • UPC: 060886974994
  • Color: Black

In addition to holding ID and a police badge, the holder can be worn three ways: carried in pocket or bag for travel, around neck by a (included but detachable) beaded neck chain or lastly, folded over and secured to a belt or holster strap. The interior of the holder features a sturdy Velcro strip at the bottom edge to keep the badge holder securely in place at all times but, still remaining close at hand for quick and easy display as needed when attached to a belt.

Made from 100% genuine leather, the ID card holder and police badge holder features is purposefully compact in design; constructed and meant to withstand heavy duty, everyday use, high quality genuine leather and reinforced stitching make this badge holder lightweight, highly durable and able to withstand rough and demanding conditions. If you have a physically demanding field job or work in high intensity operative or crisis situations, having a reliable, lightweight and durable police badge and ID holder to protect and conceal your most valuable pieces of identification is paramount; this badge holder is ideal for those public or private security professionals who are regularly on the move or require discretion for sensitive or covert situations.

The ASR Federal police badge and ID holder will give you the peace of mind knowing that your professional credentials are right where they’re supposed to be and easily accessible when needed for display.
